title: MapRoulette v2 challenge generator from a pack
context: MapRoulette is one of the preferred contribution channels for open-map-gaps: it lets human mappers fix one feature at a time through the OSM editor, with built-in validation, without requiring a Tasking Manager project. This generator takes a reviewed candidate-feature dataset (candidates-009) and produces a valid MapRoulette v2 challenge GeoJSON that can be posted by a human. The generator must never POST to the MapRoulette API autonomously — it produces a file for a human to upload.
objective: Build and ship a MapRoulette v2 challenge generator that takes a reviewed candidate-feature dataset and produces a valid v2 challenge GeoJSON file for human upload.
acceptanceCriteria: Generator takes a reviewed candidate-feature dataset (candidates-009 format) and produces a valid MapRoulette v2 challenge GeoJSON.
Generator does not call the MapRoulette API autonomously; it outputs a file for a human to upload.
Output challenge GeoJSON validates against the MapRoulette v2 challenge schema; pinned schema version is recorded in specVersions.
Ships committed golden fixtures (pack input → expected challenge GeoJSON); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md — Solution approach; machine-readable outputs section
output: A merged PR containing the MapRoulette v2 challenge generator (TypeScript/ESM), golden fixtures, passing CI, and specVersions recording the pinned MapRoulette v2 schema version.
